scope: AgenC daemon agent.stop and CLI stop behavior mapped from the donor background-agent close/shutdown flow. AgenC exposes the stop as a daemon JSON-RPC method and agenc agent stop command, while preserving the donor intent that shutdown removes the live runner and leaves an inspectable previous/final state.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow donor source root path

requiredBehaviors: agent.stop is accepted after initialize and routed through the daemon agent manager
agent.stop validates a non-empty agentId and rejects malformed parameters before invoking lifecycle code
agent.stop returns the daemon AgentStopResult shape with the target agent id and whether a live agent was stopped
edgeCases: missing agentId returns the standard INVALID_ARGUMENT JSON-RPC error
agent.stop remains non-cancellable because it is side-effecting once dispatched

requiredBehaviors: stopping a live daemon agent calls the background runner stop hook with the requested reason
daemon-owned sessions for the agent are terminated during stop
the agent is omitted from active listing after stop but getAgent keeps a stopped summary for final-state inspection
stopping an already stopped persisted agent returns stopped=false without invoking the runner again
the lifecycle state enters a non-refreshable stopping state before runner shutdown can make the live runner snapshot disappear
edgeCases: agents that disappear from the runner before explicit stop are treated as not found
stopping and stopped agents are not refreshed away by runner snapshots after the final state is recorded
runner shutdown failure marks the daemon agent as error and does not report stopped=true

requiredBehaviors: the delegate background runner keeps an agent visible as stopping while shutdown is in progress
control shutdown failures propagate to callers instead of being swallowed
failed shutdown attempts leave the runner snapshot in an error state for lifecycle callers
edgeCases: bootstrap cleanup is only attempted after control shutdown succeeds
successful shutdown still removes the active runner entry and buffered daemon state

requiredBehaviors: agenc agent stop <id> parses as a dedicated lifecycle command with exactly one id argument
the JSON-line daemon client exposes stopAgent and sends agent.stop over an initialized, authenticated connection
the CLI prints a compact stop outcome suitable for scripts
edgeCases: missing or extra stop arguments produce help-backed CLI errors
a daemon response with stopped=false is printed distinctly as already_stopped

requiredBehaviors: top-level agenc help lists agenc agent stop <id> alongside start, list, and attach
edgeCases: non-agent prompts are still not claimed by the agent command parser
